channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The President Lacks Legal Authority to Impose Tolls on the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Nor does he have that power anywhere else.

item.title: Keir Starmer's Decline Was Inevitable
item.description: His administration engaged in a particularly harsh form of class conflict.

item.title: A Decade After Brexit, Britain Is Better Off
item.description: Ten years on, Brexit has proven beneficial for the UK, and rejoining the EU is unlikely.

item.title: Trump Should Tie U.S. Aid to Venezuela to Market Reforms
item.description: With the GE power grid deal and potential energy investments, the U.S. has a valuable opportunity it should not waste.
